statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); dir=$(basename "$cwd"); if git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1; then branch=$(git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'detached'); if [ -n "$(git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ]; then dirty='*'; else dirty=''; fi; printf '%s %s %s%s' "$model" "$dir" "$branch" "$dirty"; else printf '%s %s' "$model" "$dir"; fi
